5 0000010010 2
Starting at I 6 increasing

5 I 7

Selected
0 I 2

5 XOR 70
6 I 1
7 I 2

Applying to 11101101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 2 = 1
1 I 3 = 0
2 I 4 = 1
3 I 5 = 1
4 I 6 = 0
5 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,1) = 0
6 I 1 = 1
7 I 2 = 1

\boxed{10110011}
